description: Returns latest stored inspection-year distribution for current registered passenger cars. Use for inspection recency/freshness questions. Not a legal overdue-compliance verdict by itself.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsDato IS NOT NULL | EVAL insp_year = DATE_EXTRACT("year", SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsDato) | WHERE insp_year >= 1990 AND insp_year <= 2030 | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY insp_year | SORT insp_year DESC | LIMIT 20
